list.description: Defines the frontend name pattern to be excluded from TCP+HTTP related metrics, like connection and byte counters. These frontends are local/internal, and their metrics are already being counted from the public ones.
list.name: front_exclude_tcp_metrics

list.description: Defines the frontend name pattern to be excluded from HTTP related metrics, like HTTP responses counter. These frontends are local/internal, and their metrics are already being counted from the public HTTP ones.
list.name: front_exclude_http_metrics
